About

Who We Are…

500+ Horses Hauled Safely

We are a family-owned professional horse transport company, fully insured and licensed. Based out of Springfield, Ohio, we transport to anywhere in the continental United States and Canada.

As horse lovers, owners, and professionals ourselves, we take great pride in giving each horse we transport the best possible care through the entire process. Horse transport is our passion — not just our business.

Whether you are looking for a safe, stress-free ride for your horse or want the personal attention that a family-owned company can provide, we've got you covered.

  • Fully insured — your horse is always protected
  • Personally handle every horse as if it were our own
  • Regular photo & text updates throughout every trip
  • Climate-controlled, custom trailers with bedded stalls
  • Available 7 days a week, including emergency hauling
Book Your Transport →
Services

What We Do…

Horse transport is our passion. Whether you are looking for a safe, specific, and comfortable ride for your horse — or want the kind of attention that only a family-owned company can provide — we've got you covered.

We transport your horses anywhere in the continental United States and Canada. From short local hauls to coast-to-coast runs, every trip gets the same level of dedication and care.

How We Do It

Regular cleaning, maintenance, and sanitizing of our rigs. Scheduled water and feed stops. Non-stop monitoring so your horse is always comfortable, safe, and accounted for — every mile of every trip.

🚚

Long Distance Hauling

Coast-to-coast transport with planned rest stops, fresh bedding, and real-time updates. No route too far.

🏆

Show & Competition

Arrive calm and ready. We coordinate around show schedules and handle every detail from departure to ring-side.

🚨

Emergency Transport

24/7 emergency hauling for veterinary referrals and urgent situations. We mobilize fast when it matters most.

📍

Local Hauls

Reliable same-day and next-day transport within Ohio and surrounding states for vet visits, farm moves, and more.

🐴

Multi-Horse Loads

Safe transport for multiple horses together. Compatible pairings, individual spaces, and careful monitoring throughout.

📋

Paperwork Assistance

We guide you through Coggins testing, health certificates, and interstate permit requirements for a smooth trip.

The Process

What To Expect From Us

From the moment you reach out to the moment your horse arrives, we walk you through every step. Whether this is your first time transporting a horse, or just your first time with us — we make it easy.

1

Submit Your Booking Request

Fill out our simple booking form with your pickup location, destination, date, and horse details. No commitment required at this stage.

2

Brielle Reviews & Confirms

She'll call or text personally to verify your route, discuss your horse's specific needs, and provide a firm quote.

3

Sign the Transport Agreement

Complete the online agreement to lock in your booking and ensure full insurance coverage from pickup to delivery.

4

Pay Securely Online

Pay by card or wire transfer. A deposit holds your date; the balance is due at pickup or per your agreed terms.

5

Live Updates & Safe Arrival

You'll receive photo and text updates throughout the entire journey. Your horse arrives calm, healthy, and on time.

Client Testimonials

What Our Customers Are Saying

★★★★★

Brielle transported my mare from Kentucky to Texas — nearly 1,200 miles. She sent photos and updates the entire way. My horse arrived calmer than when she left. I cannot recommend Brielle highly enough.

Sarah M.
Arabian Mare Owner · Louisville, KY → Dallas, TX
★★★★★

Used Brielle twice for show transport now. She knows horses — my gelding loads without hesitation for her. Always early, always communicative, and genuinely cares about every animal in her care.

James & Kelley R.
Quarter Horse Show Team · Nashville, TN
★★★★★

I called Brielle at 9pm on a Sunday for an emergency vet transport. She was at my farm by 11pm. That kind of dedication is rare. My horse had surgery and made a full recovery — Brielle was part of that story.

Donna T.
Thoroughbred Owner · Lexington, KY
★★★★★

Brielle hauled my two miniature horses from Indiana all the way to Florida. She treated them like royalty the entire trip — bedded stalls, regular hay stops, and adorable photo updates. I was nervous sending my minis so far but she made it completely stress-free.

Tammy L.
Miniature Horse Owner · Indianapolis, IN → Orlando, FL
★★★★★

I've used several haulers over the years and Brielle is hands-down the best. She actually knows horses — the way she handles them at loading makes such a difference. My mare arrived relaxed, hydrated, and eating. Will never use anyone else.

Mike & Patty D.
Paint Horse Owners · Knoxville, TN
★★★★★

Brielle transported my young colt across four states for a sale. He's never traveled that far before and I was worried sick. She checked in with me every few hours with pictures and he arrived in perfect condition. Truly outstanding service.

Rachel K.
Quarter Horse Breeder · Louisville, KY → Nashville, TN
★★★★★

Our barn manager recommended Brielle and now I recommend her to everyone. On time, professional, and genuinely passionate about animal welfare. She noticed my gelding was a bit anxious and took extra time to settle him before hitting the road. That's real care.

Christine W.
Warmblood Owner · Pittsburgh, PA → Lexington, KY
★★★★★

I rescued a horse out of state and needed transport on short notice. Brielle made it happen in under 48 hours. She coordinated everything, handled the paperwork questions, and delivered my new girl safely. She went above and beyond every step of the way.

Amanda S.
Rescue Horse Owner · Charleston, WV
★★★★★

Brielle hauled my mare from Georgia all the way to Colorado for a breeding program. I was honestly terrified about such a long trip but she kept me calm with constant updates and photos. My horse arrived healthier than I expected after that distance. Absolutely the best in the business.

Lisa M.
Andalusian Mare Owner · Atlanta, GA → Denver, CO
★★★★★

We hired Brielle to transport three horses from Virginia to a competition in Texas. She coordinated everything perfectly, arrived ahead of schedule, and our horses were calm and ready to compete the next morning. Two of them placed in their classes — she deserves part of that ribbon!

Brad & Susan F.
Show Horse Team · Richmond, VA → Fort Worth, TX
★★★★★

I purchased a horse in Michigan and needed him brought down to North Carolina on short notice. Brielle squeezed us in, kept the trip smooth, and even sent a video of him eating hay in the trailer looking totally relaxed. I felt completely at ease the entire time. Highly recommend.

Nicole B.
Tennessee Walker Owner · Detroit, MI → Raleigh, NC
★★★★★

My stallion is notoriously difficult to load — every hauler I'd tried before struggled with him. Brielle had him in the trailer in under 10 minutes. She has a gift with horses that you just can't teach. The trip from Missouri to Pennsylvania went flawlessly. She's now my permanent hauler, period.

Derek H.
Friesian Stallion Owner · Kansas City, MO → Harrisburg, PA

Legal Agreement

Transportation Agreement

All clients must complete and sign this agreement before transport begins. A copy will be emailed to both you and Brielle.

HORSE TRANSPORTATION & HAULER AGREEMENT

Brielle Williams Horse Transport · Springfield, OH

1. Owner Information

2. Horse Information

3. Transportation Details

4. Terms & Conditions

Owner Requirements: Owner agrees to provide a current negative Coggins test, valid Interstate Health Certificate, and ensure horse is halter-broke, fit for travel, and free from contagious illness.

Emergency Veterinary Authorization: If Owner cannot be reached in an emergency, the Transporter is authorized to obtain emergency veterinary care. All expenses remain the Owner's responsibility.

Insurance & Risk: The Transporter maintains commercial liability insurance. Owner acknowledges the inherent risks of equine transportation and is encouraged to maintain mortality or medical insurance.

Cancellation Policy: If transport cannot be completed due to mechanical failure, weather, or emergencies beyond the Transporter's control, the Owner may reschedule or receive a full refund.

Release of Liability: Owner agrees to release and hold harmless the Transporter from claims arising during transport, except where gross negligence or willful misconduct is proven.

Payment: Wire Transfer — Account Holder: Brielle Williams | Bank: Lead Bank. Governing Law: State of Ohio.

5. Signature

By typing your name above, you agree this constitutes a legally binding electronic signature.

A copy will be emailed to briellewilliams870@gmail.com and to you for your records.
